name: Sri Lanka Murukku Deep Fried Dumpling
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt, and chile powder in a bowl until well combined.
2. Gradually add coconut milk to the dry ingredients, stirring continuously to form a smooth paste that can pass through a murukku mould or an icing syringe with a star nozzle.
3. Allow the mixture to rest for 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to around 175°C (350°F).
5. Using a piping syringe, carefully squeeze the paste onto a floured board and cut into desired lengths.
6. Form the dough into loops and gently lower them into the hot oil.
7. Deep fry until golden brown.
8. Remove from oil using tongs or a slotted spoon, allowing excess oil to drip off.
9. Sprinkle with salt and chile powder before serving.
